user.title: Generac Mobile Link
user.description: Enter your Mobile Link username (email). You will be guided to log in and provide a session cookie.

login_guidance.title: Log in to Mobile Link
login_guidance.description:
1. Open [{login_url}]({login_url}) and log in as **{username}** (complete any CAPTCHA).

2. Open Developer Tools (F12) → **Network** tab.

3. Refresh the page.

4. Select any request to app.mobilelinkgen.com and copy the full **Cookie** request header.

5. Paste it below. You can paste the raw cookie value, a `Cookie: ...` line, copied request headers, or a curl command that includes the cookie.

select_tanks.title: Select propane tanks
select_tanks.description: Choose which propane tanks to add to Home Assistant.

reauth_guidance.title: Re-authenticate Mobile Link
reauth_guidance.description: Your Mobile Link session has expired. Log in again at [{login_url}]({login_url}) and paste a fresh cookie for **{username}**.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired cookie. Please log in again and paste a fresh cookie.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Mobile Link. Check your network connection and cookie.
error.no_tanks_selected: Select at least one propane tank.

abort.already_configured: This Mobile Link account is already configured.
abort.no_tanks: No propane tanks were found for this account.

init.title: Mobile Link options
init.description: Choose which tanks to monitor and which optional sensors to create.
